full_text:
Meng Yao еӯҹжӣң
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Yao (еӯҹжӣң). Helped Du Kui create music fit for the Imperial Court. Music which Du KuiвҖҷs moral objections meant it never got used. Meng Yao was affiliated with Liu Biao.
